reviewContext.scope: Sprint 6 Phase 3 iter-2 — verifying iter-1 LOW finding resolutions

evidence.description: CRIT-304 description (line 43) updated to record FIND-S6-PHASE3-002 resolution: '当初予定の test wrapper Svelte component は実装段階で property test が FeedRow を直接 mount できることが判明したため不要となり削除'. Allowlist regex (line 45) does NOT include any path matching FeedRowSprint6PropertyWrapper.svelte, so the deleted file is not part of the contract surface.

Sprint 6 Test Strategy table (line 818) marks the wrapper as removed: '~~promptnotes/src/lib/feed/__tests__/dom/_helpers/FeedRowSprint6PropertyWrapper.svelte~~ (Phase 3 で不要と判明、削除) ... FIND-S6-PHASE3-002 解消'. The annotation also explains the rationale (property test mounts FeedRow directly via mount()/props per-run).

Cell 3 saving variant test (lines 188-218) now pins the REQ-FEED-006 click-suppression regression with explicit assertion at line 215: 'expect(feedAdapter.dispatchSelectPastNote).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(0);'. The test name itself encodes the contract ('cell 3 variant (saving, other row): click blocked by isFeedRowClickBlocked → dispatchSelectPastNote 0 calls (REQ-FEED-006 regression)'), and the inline comment at lines 210-214 documents why the suppression applies even when this row's noteId differs from editingNoteId (because feedRowPredicates.isFeedRowClickBlocked treats 'saving' as blocked irrespective of noteId match). FIND-S6-PHASE3-001 resolved.

Line 215 assertion is concrete and behaviorally meaningful: it verifies dispatchSelectPastNote was NOT called after dispatching a click on feed-row-button when editingStatus='saving' (for a different note). The mock adapter is constructed at line 189 (vi.fn() returning a resolved Promise), the click is fired at line 207, flushSync at line 208 settles reactivity, and the toHaveBeenCalledTimes(0) assertion at line 215 closes the previously-missing observation gap from iter-1.

Read tool reports 'File does not exist' for the _helpers directory and for the expected wrapper path FeedRowSprint6PropertyWrapper.svelte. The dead test infrastructure flagged by FIND-S6-PHASE3-002 has been removed from the working tree.

Line 43 imports FeedRow directly: 'import FeedRow from "../../FeedRow.svelte";'. No import of any wrapper. This confirms the rationale recorded in CRIT-304 / verification-architecture.md: the property test mounts FeedRow directly, making the wrapper component dead code that is now correctly removed.

CRIT-304 allowlist (line 45) defines the 1-file-constraint via an explicit grep -vE regex listing every authorized path. The regex enumerates: FeedRow.svelte (production), .vcsdd/** artifacts, three new test files (feed-row-preview-exclusivity.{dom.vitest,property.test}.ts and feed-row-click-routing.dom.vitest.ts), two pre-existing tests (feed-row-best-effort-dispatch.dom.vitest.ts and main-route-wiring.dom.vitest.ts), and two infra files (vitest.config.ts, bunfig.toml). No _helpers wrapper path is allowlisted, consistent with its deletion. Verification surface is binary-grep-decidable.

Phase history line 615 records 'Sprint 6 Phase 2b Green complete — Sprint 6 PROP-S6-001..007 17 tests PASS; full vitest 240/240 + bun 1909/1909 regression PASS'. Line 629 records 'Sprint 6 Phase 3 PASS at iter-1 — 5/5 dimensions PASS, 0 HIGH, 2 LOW resolved post-review'. Iter-2 task is solely to formalize PASS on the post-review LOW resolutions.

FIND-S6-PHASE3-001.resolution: Cell 3 saving variant test now pins expect(feedAdapter.dispatchSelectPastNote).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(0) at feed-row-click-routing.dom.vitest.ts:215. The previously-missing assertion that would have allowed REQ-FEED-006 click-suppression regressions to slip through is now in place.

FIND-S6-PHASE3-002.resolution: FeedRowSprint6PropertyWrapper.svelte and the enclosing _helpers/ directory have been deleted from the working tree. CRIT-304 description (sprint-6.md L43) records the removal rationale and the allowlist regex (L45) does not authorize the wrapper path. verification-architecture.md Test Strategy table (L818) marks the wrapper as removed with FIND-S6-PHASE3-002 解消 annotation. The property test (feed-row-preview-exclusivity.property.test.ts:43) mounts FeedRow directly, confirming the wrapper was unused dead code.

limitations: Adversary instance has no Bash/shell tool in this environment, so the requested regression command 'cd promptnotes && bun run test:dom -- src/lib/feed/__tests__/dom/feed-row-click-routing.dom.vitest.ts' was not re-executed by the adversary. Regression status is taken from state.json phase-history evidence (line 615: 'full vitest 240/240 + bun 1909/1909 regression PASS' at end of Sprint 6 Phase 2b Green). If the orchestrator requires fresh regression evidence for iter-2, it must run the command externally and attach the log under .vcsdd/features/ui-feed-list-actions/evidence/.
